---
name: Device report
about: A row of the compatibility probe did not animate on your device
title: "Probe row [N] does not animate on [device]"
labels: compatibility
---

**Which rows did not move?**
(1 slide / 2 fade / 3 color / 4 draw / 5 type / 6 turn)

**Device**
e.g. iPhone 8, Pixel 6, ThinkPad

**Operating system and version**
e.g. iOS 16.7, Android 14, Windows 11

**Browser and version**
e.g. Safari, Chrome 127, Firefox

**Where did you view it?**
e.g. GitHub README on mobile web, GitHub mobile app, opened the raw .svg file

**Anything else?**
A screenshot helps. So does whether Reduce Motion is switched on.
